metaBuilds.title: Physical Brawler
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 24 — about 627 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +29% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Viper over Soulbinder (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Lethality DPS Carry
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 24 — about 307 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.2× the sustained auto DPS: try Viper over Alternator (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.title: Physical Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 24 — about 821 damage in one combo in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Sparrow ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and armor blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Murdock deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Revenant ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Drongo deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. Skylar ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands. TwinBlast ramps on auto-attacks — pressure their positioning before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Plasma Blade: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Zinx's main threat is Ricochet; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Phase's main threat is Energy Lance; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.
They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Dekker deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Riktor ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.
Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling. Adele deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.
They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Mourn's main threat is Abduct; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.
